title: Blogs
content:
## What are the employment based visa categories?
For employment based petitions, each category is based on the type of employment you are accepting.The visa categories are usually based on skill and experience and industry.Each visa category has a certain number of visas available every year. If the U.S. government receives more applications than the number of visas available, then there is a […]

## Proposed Fee Increase by USCIS
USCIS is proposing a fee increase for many of its applications. Though we do not know the exact date these new fees will be in effect but based on past experience, it will be before the end of the year. Here is a list of the most common forms and the proposed fee increase. Please […]
